comments.comment: Plan says 'optional' elapsed field on FrameState, but renderLoop will always compute it. Make it required to avoid unnecessary undefined checks in geometry systems.
createPRNG(seed) returns () => number (0-1 floats, Mulberry32). Plan's usage is correct. Seed namespace ':evo' avoids collision with other PRNG consumers.
renderLoop already tracks lastTime but not startTime. Adding startTime capture on first frame (when lastTime < 0) fits cleanly into existing logic.

At elapsedMs=0, sin(0 + phaseOffset) != 0 unless phaseOffset is 0. To guarantee near-zero drift at start, subtract sin(phaseOffset) from each term so the curve starts at 0 displacement regardless of phase.
Test for reduced-motion should verify motionAmplitude is untouched (passed through from base). Plan correctly identifies this.
Existing renderLoop tests mock geometrySystem.draw — update those mocks to expect the new elapsed field in FrameState to avoid test breakage.
